pricingPolicy: Sherwin-Williams public pro pages require sign-in to confirm account-specific pricing and availability. These Ready White defaults are conservative estimating allowances and must be replaced with the current Ready White Sherwin-Williams account/net prices during pricing reviews.
coveragePolicy: Use the low end of the Sherwin-Williams published 350-400 sq ft per gallon coverage range to preserve margin and reduce exception risk.

property_solution_interior_flat.label: Sherwin-Williams Property Solution Interior Latex Flat
property_solution_interior_flat.notes: Default turnover-flat estimating allowance. Replace with Ready White account pricing before production quote locks.

builders_solution_interior_flat.label: Sherwin-Williams Builders Solution Interior Latex Flat
builders_solution_interior_flat.notes: Builder/turnover estimating allowance. Sherwin-Williams page requires sign-in for current price.

promar_200_zero_voc_eg_shel.label: Sherwin-Williams ProMar 200 Zero VOC Interior Latex Eg-Shel
promar_200_zero_voc_eg_shel.notes: Standard Market Ready / Premium Listing Ready estimating allowance. Coverage based on published 350-400 sq ft per gallon product data.

promar_400_zero_voc_flat.label: Sherwin-Williams ProMar 400 Zero VOC Interior Latex Flat
promar_400_zero_voc_flat.notes: Basic Turn White estimating allowance; confirm availability and account price with Sherwin-Williams rep.

stain_blocking_primer.label: Sherwin-Williams stain-blocking primer allowance
stain_blocking_primer.notes: Exception-only allowance for stains, smoke, water damage, heavy prep, and approved scope exceptions.
